KPlugin.Name: Advanced Weather Widget
KPlugin.Description: A modern, highly customizable weather widget built specifically for KDE Plasma 6. Designed for seamless Plasma integration, performance, and flexibility.
KPlugin.Description[bg]: Модерен и силно персонализируем уиджет за времето, създаден специално за KDE Plasma 6. Проектиран за естествена интеграция, производителност и гъвкавост.
KPlugin.Description[de]: Ein modernes, hochgradig anpassbares Wetter-Widget, das speziell für KDE Plasma 6 entwickelt wurde. Konzipiert für nahtlose Plasma-Integration, Performance und Flexibilität.

Authors.Name: Petar Nedyalkov
Authors.Role: Author, design, development and Bulgarian translation
